chapter_title.en: Chapter on Livelihoods, Earnings, Profits, and Professions

text: 3650 - : وَ نَهَى رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ عَنْ أُجْرَةِ اَلْقَارِئِ اَلَّذِي لاَ يَقْرَأُ إِلاَّ عَلَى أَجْرٍ مَشْرُوطٍ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.3650 - The Messenger of Allah (swt), peace and blessings be upon him and his family, forbade taking payment for recitation by one who does not recite except on a stipulated fee.
